summary: The page renders all 10 sections in correct order with EDS signature classes present and text content matching the design closely. Key issues are the missing hero banner image/heading in the render, undersized images, and ISI heading colors/weights rendering wrong.

issues.expected: Light blue hero panel with 'What Is PrEP?' h1 and image-33 (324x210) visible
issues.actual: Hero panel/heading and image do not appear in the render (strip 1 shows no hero section); image rendered at 235x210 per measurements
issues.fix: Ensure the eds-hero-banner renders its background, h1, and image at 324x210; fix overflow/min-height collapse
Set explicit width 324px and prevent column shrink
Apply color #327C95 and font-weight 600 to .isi-head (already in CSS — verify specificity/override)
Force width 396px on .video-thumb-img beating eds width:100%

issues.expected: thumbnail x=279, play-icon x=441, mask-group x=387
issues.fix: Adjust column/alignment so thumbnails left-align to x≈279
Adjust column padding/alignment to shift image right
Align font-weight to design and verify scale

Shift horizontally to x≈387px (check column/alignment classes)
Shift horizontally to x≈899px (check column/alignment classes)
